product_overview: A modular RPA + AI + BI pipeline that collects dock progress and safety data, generates a Tailwind-based smart yard dashboard, predicts D-Day (projected completion) with AI insights, and enables CSV report exports for operational decision making.
core_goals: Automate real-time collection and normalization of dock progress and safety data (RPA -> CSV).
Provide an always-updated Tailwind-styled dashboard for operational visibility and safety alerts.
Deliver predictive analytics (D-Day) and AI-driven resource optimization recommendations.
Enable one-click CSV report exports and simple integration with Power BI for downstream reporting.
Maintain modular, extensible architecture to allow future DB connectors and advanced AI models.

features.name: Update Dock Status
features.description: API endpoint to receive per-dock progress and safety information and persist it to the canonical CSV datastore (dock_status.csv).
user_flows: POST /api/v1/update-dock with JSON payload {dock_id, progress, safety_issue, current_task} -> Receive 200 OK with confirmation and saved_row_id -> GET /data/dock_status.csv -> Receive 200 OK with CSV containing the newly saved row

POST /api/v1/update-dock with malformed JSON (missing dock_id) -> Receive 400 Bad Request with validation error message -> GET /data/dock_status.csv -> Receive 200 OK with CSV unchanged (no new row for malformed request)

features.name: Dashboard Generation
features.description: Automatically re-generates the Tailwind-based smart yard dashboard HTML when underlying CSV data changes so the UI always reflects the latest dock and safety state.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/update-dock with valid payload -> Receive 200 OK confirming data saved -> GET /smart_yard_dashboard.html -> Receive 200 OK with updated HTML reflecting latest data

POST /api/v1/update-dock with valid payload -> Receive 200 OK confirming data saved -> GET /smart_yard_dashboard.html during regeneration -> Receive 503 Service Unavailable with 'regenerating' message -> GET /smart_yard_dashboard.html after short retry -> Receive 200 OK with regenerated dashboard HTML

features.name: AX Analytics
features.description: Provides business intelligence APIs that calculate projected completion dates (D-Day) and deliver AI-driven resource optimization and safety insights based on current dock data.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/analytics/dday?dock_id=DOCK-01 -> Receive 200 OK with JSON {dock_id, current_progress, daily_productivity_rate, days_remaining, projected_completion_date}
GET /api/v1/analytics/insights?dock_id=DOCK-01 -> Receive 200 OK with JSON {dock_id, risk_level, recommended_actions} where recommendations may include 'reallocate_resources' or 'safety_inspection'
GET /api/v1/analytics/dday?dock_id=UNKNOWN -> Receive 404 Not Found with error 'dock not found' -> GET /api/v1/analytics/insights?dock_id=UNKNOWN -> Receive 404 Not Found with same error

features.name: Report Export
features.description: Allow users to export processed dock data as a CSV report from the dashboard or via an API endpoint for downstream BI ingestion or archival.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/export-dock-csv -> Receive 200 OK with Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="dock_status.csv" and CSV payload in response body

GET /api/v1/export-dock-csv when no rows available -> Receive 204 No Content (or 200 with explanatory header) indicating there is no data to export -> Client prompts user 'No data available for export'

features.name: Update Dock Status
features.description: Receives dock progress and safety data via POST /api/v1/update-dock and saves to CSV.

features.description: Automatically re-generates the Tailwind-based smart yard dashboard HTML when data is updated.

features.description: Export processed dock data as a CSV report via a dashboard button.
